commit.message:
Fix i18n: change docs_dir from docs/en to docs

The i18n plugin with docs_structure: folder needs docs_dir to point
to the PARENT folder (docs/) not the English subfolder (docs/en/).
Otherwise the plugin can't find the pt/ and fr/ language folders.

- Before: docs_dir: docs/en → only EN loaded, PT/FR ignored
- After:  docs_dir: docs   → plugin finds en/, pt/, fr/ as expected

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: bypass interceptor chain for languages bootstrap request

Use HttpBackend directly for /api/v1/languages to avoid circular
dependency: I18nService -> HttpClient -> interceptors -> AuthStore ->
I18nService. The languages endpoint is public and doesn't need auth
headers or error interceptor processing.

- Drop egui_extras "file" feature (only added mime_guess2, unused)

rendering in markdown preview works via egui_extras image loader.

commit.message:
feat: veto_keywords hook, chaos module scenarios, GAEngine schema fixes

## loop.py — pre-LLM veto_keywords guardrail (p6-code-hook + p6-veto)
- Added pre-LLM content veto gate in _run_loop() before LLM call
- CISO/Compliance/Architect agents can declare veto_keywords in permissions_json
- If incoming message contains a keyword → immediate VETO emitted, LLM skipped
- Deterministic, tamper-resistant: no prompt injection possible on guardrail level
- Source: ADR-0015, inspired by OWASP LLM01 (prompt injection guardrails)

## chaos_endurance.py — module resilience scenarios (chaos-module-scenarios)
- Added SCENARIOS_MODULE list: module_disable_browser_cli, module_disable_rtk, module_disable_redis
- Added _set_module_enabled() helper: toggle module ON/OFF in DB settings
- Added _exec_module_scenario(): disable module → verify health → re-enable → measure MTTR
- Rationale: optional modules MUST NOT crash the platform when Settings toggle is OFF
- Delegates from _exec_scenario() else branch to keep main handler clean

## migrations.py — GAEngine + agents schema (p9-project-id-fk + p10-ga-trigger)
- evolution_proposals: add genome_json, fitness, run_id (code uses these, table had old names)
- evolution_runs: add wf_id, generations, fitness_history_json (same divergence)
- Drop NOT NULL on legacy columns (workflow_id, mutated_config) for coexistence
- agents: add project_id column (links ft-* project agents to their project)
- All migration statements are idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS / DROP IF EXISTS)

Verified: GAEngine.evolve_all() saves 9 proposals + 3 runs to DB correctly.
veto_keywords set on 9 critical agents (CISO, DPO, compliance, architects) via script.
project_id backfilled on 28 ft-* agents.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test(w71): feature gate + capability reporting tests (~40 tests) (#601)

## Summary

Add comprehensive feature gate boundary tests enforcing the **\"no green
by omission\"** invariant — when optional features
(git/content/walk/halstead) are unavailable, the code must not silently
succeed or produce empty results.

### \crates/tokmd-analysis/tests/feature_gates_w71.rs\ (26 tests)
- **Git feature gate**: risk/git/identity/deep preset git requirements,
\git=false\ override
- **Content feature gate**: health/architecture/deep content-dependent
enrichers
- **Walk feature gate**: supply/security walk-dependent enrichers
- **Receipt baseline**: receipt preset works without any optional
features
- **Health without git**: health preset does not require git
- **Risk degradation**: risk preset degrades gracefully with \git=false\
- **Capability reporting**: preset plan resolution,
\preset_plan_for_name\, \
eeds_files\ consistency
- **Receipt metadata**: schema_version, tool name, mode, warnings,
status
- **Warning contract**: \DisabledFeature\ keywords, git/walk/content
mentions
- **Grid completeness**: all 11 presets covered, deep superset of
receipt

### \crates/tokmd/tests/feature_gates_w71.rs\ (14 tests)
- **Help text**: preset values, format option, git flag visibility
- **JSON envelope**: warnings array, status field, schema_version, tool
name
- **Graceful degradation**: invalid preset fails, \--no-git\
suppression, receipt always succeeds
- **Cross-preset validation**: all presets produce valid JSON with
required fields
- **Receipt exclusion**: receipt JSON excludes optional sections (git,
entropy, assets)

commit.message:
test(w71): BDD scenario tests for user workflows (~30 tests) (#599)

## Summary

Adds 38 BDD-style scenario tests in
\crates/tokmd/tests/bdd_scenarios_w71.rs\ following Given/When/Then
naming conventions.

### Test Coverage

| # | Scenario | Description |
|---|----------|-------------|
| 1-3 | Language detection | Rust project, multi-language, empty dir |
| 4-5 | Module & exclude | Exclude patterns, module depth grouping |
| 6 | Export CSV | All files listed in CSV |
| 7 | Diff | Two receipts produce diff output |
| 8 | Exclude flag | CLI --exclude applies during scan |
| 9 | Unicode | Unicode filenames normalized |
| 10-11 | Ignore rules | Hidden files excluded, .gitignore respected |
| 12-15 | JSON validity | Valid JSON + schema_version for
lang/module/export/analyze |
| 16-19 | Determinism | Identical output on repeated runs |
| 20-22 | check-ignore | Explains why files are excluded |
| 23-32 | Misc commands | Badge, init, tools, completions, version, TSV,
no-ignore-vcs |

### Approach

- All tests use hermetic temp directories with \.git\ markers
- Deterministic: no flaky assertions, no time-dependent checks
- BDD naming: \given_X_when_Y_then_Z\
- Uses existing \common::fixture_root()\ for shared fixtures

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: break circular dependency in HTTP interceptors

tokenInterceptor and errorInterceptor injected I18nService directly,
creating a circular dependency when I18nService constructor triggered
HTTP requests (/api/v1/languages). The inject() call during I18nService
construction caused the request to fail silently, leaving the progress
bar pendingRequests counter permanently incremented.

tokenInterceptor: read language from localStorage directly instead of
injecting I18nService. errorInterceptor: lazily resolve I18nService
via Injector inside catchError callback (runs async, after construction).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add ByteArrayOutputKind enum with ViewType and LargeOffsets options

Replaces the boolean UseViewTypes with a ByteArrayOutputKind enum on
ParquetReadOptions, with UseViewTypes kept as a backwards-compatible shim.

ByteArrayOutputKind values:
- Default: StringType/BinaryType with int32 offsets (unchanged behavior)
- ViewType: StringViewType/BinaryViewType (formerly UseViewTypes=true)
- LargeOffsets: LargeStringType/LargeBinaryType with int64 offsets,
  removing the 2 GB per-column limit with otherwise identical decode path

Changes:
- ParquetReadOptions.cs: adds ByteArrayOutputKind enum; UseViewTypes becomes
  a computed init-only property over ByteArrayOutput
- ArrowSchemaConverter: ApplyOutputKind replaces ApplyViewTypes, handles all
  three enum values in a single switch expression
- ColumnBuildState: _largeOffsetsBuffer (NativeBuffer<long>) for LargeOffsets
  mode; constructor takes ByteArrayOutputKind; AddByteArrayValues and
  CommitByteArrayData write to the correct buffer based on mode
- ArrowArrayBuilder: BuildLargeStringArray, BuildLargeBinaryArray,
  BuildLargeVarBinaryArray, BuildNullableLargeVarBinaryArray,
  BuildDenseLargeVarBinaryArray added; Build/BuildDense switches extended;
  ArrowArrayFactory handles LargeStringArray/LargeBinaryArray
- ColumnChunkReader: detects LargeStringType/LargeBinaryType from field type
- 5 new LargeOffsets tests + EW_ReadAll_LargeOffsets benchmark variant

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

validation, publish plan ordering, version bump, schema detection, and
deterministic output.

scanning, analysis crate constraints
- **Docs check logic**: marker pairing, command coverage, CRLF/exe
normalization

core-before-cli, no duplicates
- **Version bump logic**: dry-run safety, invalid semver rejection,
schema bump validation
- **Schema version detection**: constants exist, paths valid, values
positive
- **Deterministic output**: publish plan, boundaries check, bump dry-run
all stable
- **Workspace metadata**: version format, member inclusion, internal dep
consistency

### publish_w71.rs (16 tests)
- **Crate ordering**: tier hierarchy, settings-before-dependents, every
crate after its deps
- **Rate limit detection**: status 429 patterns, too-many-requests,
retry-after parsing, max waits, CLI timeout arg
- **Dry run behavior**: cargo package --list usage, plan mode speed,
execution command display
- **Dependency resolution**: non-publishable exclusion, workspace
membership, count consistency, DAG validity, semver format

All 50 tests pass deterministically.
